title: LCU
description: Linear Combination of Unitaries (LCU) algorithm allows for the implementation of non-unitary operators M = sum_j alpha_j U_j on quantum computers.

params.help: Weight coefficients alpha_j of unitary operators (comma-separated, e.g., '0.6, 0.4').
params.name: alphas
params.info: 请输入逗号分隔的数字，如 0.6, 0.4

params.help: Corresponding Pauli unitary operator list (comma-separated, e.g., 'I, X').
params.name: paulis
params.info: 请输入逗号分隔的字符串，如 I, X

params.help: The number of qubits in the system register.
params.name: n
